What I Do

Motion graphics & video editing with a focus on talking head and business content

  • • Produce professional Talking Head Videos for businesses, creators, and agencies.
  • • Edit YouTube talking-head videos with professional pacing and viewer retention.
  • • Create storytelling, explainer, and business videos that serve a clear purpose.
  • • Deliver post-production files you can reuse and update years down the line.
  • • Apply industry-level motion graphics techniques to make every video look professional.
